# terrible_community_general_logentries_msg (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `msg` (String) The message body.
- `token` (String) Log token.

### Optional

- `api` (String) API endpoint.
- `port` (Number) API endpoint port.
